title: Remove docs that refer to bors, since we're not using it
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Remove the bits of our documentation that referred to bors, its bot, and its configuration file, since we switched to a different merge bot.

#### How to verify it

Visual inspection.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [nalind] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Nice touch up @nalind LGTM
But, you need to rebase.
